reviews.comment:
Muy buena la estación, comida fresca y a buen precio además de naftas y servicios. Sin duda volveré cuando pase por la zona.

(Translated by Google)
The station is great, with fresh food at good prices, plus fuel and services. I'll definitely be back when I'm in the area.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBaHFxM0JBEAE

reviews.comment:
Habitación que no se condice con el precio. Mala limpieza. Baño con bidé sin funcionar, tabla del inodoro suelta y canillas del lavabo con perdida. Somier incómodo -mala calidad- y frazadas que deberían enviarse a tintorería. Equipamiento de TV y AA obsoleto, caloventor sin control remoto. Ruido de bomba de agua muy molesto. Cochera cubierta con lona y poco espacio para maniobrar (si tocan los extremos). Incluye desayuno mínimo -café con dos medialunas-. Creeria que es necesario hacer un replanteo del servicio y un buen mantenimiento!!!
.

(Translated by Google)
The room was not worth the price. Poor cleaning. The bathroom had a non-functioning bidet, a loose toilet seat, and leaking faucets in the sink. The bed frame was uncomfortable and of poor quality, and the blankets needed to be dry-cleaned. The TV and AC equipment were outdated, and the space heater lacked a remote control. The water pump noise was very annoying. The covered parking space was just a tarp, but there was little room to maneuver (if the ends touched). The breakfast included was minimal—coffee and two croissants. I believe a complete overhaul of the service and proper maintenance are necessary!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRNUtpc1lnEAE
